title: Single, NOL carryforward (post-TCJA 80% limit, §172(a)(2))
description: Recovering filer with $40,000 NOL carryforward from prior loss year. Current year W-2 $50,000 (taxable before NOL ≈ $35,400). §172(a)(2) post-TCJA: NOL deduction ≤ 80% × taxable. Cap = 80% × $35,400 = $28,320. NOL used: $28,320. Remaining $11,680 carries forward.
expectations: Federal tax on post-NOL taxable income ≈ $7,080 ($35,400 − $28,320)
